name.description: The name of the autoscale setting. This is a unique identifier for the autoscale configuration.

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs that can be used to organize and categorize the autoscale setting resource.

target_resource_id.description: The ID of the resource that the autoscale setting will target. This is the resource that will be scaled.

capacity_default.description: The default capacity of the resource.

capacity_minimum.description: The minimum capacity of the resource.

capacity_maximum.description: The maximum capacity of the resource.

scale_mode.description: Specifies the predictive scale mode. Possible values are Enabled or ForecastOnly.

look_ahead_time.description: The amount of time to look ahead when calculating the prediction.

email_ids_for_notifications.description: A list of email addresses to send notifications to when autoscale conditions are triggered.

rules.description: One or more (up to 10) rule blocks
rules.type: list(object({metric_name: string, metric_resource_id: string, time_grain: string, statistic: string, time_window: string, time_aggregation: string, operator: string, threshold: number, metric_namespace: string, metric_dimension_name: string, metric_dimension_operator: string, metric_dimension_values: list(string), scale_action_direction: string, scale_action_type: string, scale_action_value: number, scale_action_cooldown: string}))

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
